# MAGIC Gamma Telescope Dataset Provenance

Dataset:
- MAGIC Gamma Telescope Data Set (UCI Machine Learning Repository)

Source URLs:
- https://archive.ics.uci.edu/ml/machine-learning-databases/magic/magic04.data
- https://archive.ics.uci.edu/ml/machine-learning-databases/magic/magic04.names

Local files:
- `magic04.data`
- `magic04.names`

Acquisition date (local workspace):
- 2026-04-19

Use in this repository:
- integrated into the structural-information harness as independent external lane
- dataset key: `external_uci_magic_gamma`
- target used in harness: binary class label (`g` vs `h`)

Nonclaim:
- this repository does not claim authorship of the source dataset.
